cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.13)
project(boringssl_new C CXX)
set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD 11)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
set(BSSL ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../boringssl-new)
set(CRYPTO_SOURCES
    ${BSSL}/crypto/aes/aes.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/asn1/a_bitstr.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/asn1/a_bool.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/asn1/a_d2i_fp.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/asn1/a_dup.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/asn1/a_gentm.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/asn1/a_i2d_fp.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/asn1/a_int.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/asn1/a_mbstr.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/asn1/a_object.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/asn1/a_octet.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/asn1/a_strex.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/asn1/a_strnid.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/asn1/a_time.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/asn1/a_type.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/asn1/a_utctm.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/asn1/asn1_lib.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/asn1/asn1_par.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/asn1/asn_pack.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/asn1/f_int.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/asn1/f_string.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/asn1/posix_time.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/asn1/tasn_dec.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/asn1/tasn_enc.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/asn1/tasn_fre.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/asn1/tasn_new.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/asn1/tasn_typ.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/asn1/tasn_utl.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/base64/base64.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/bio/bio.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/bio/bio_mem.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/bio/connect.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/bio/errno.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/bio/fd.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/bio/file.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/bio/hexdump.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/bio/pair.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/bio/printf.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/bio/socket.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/bio/socket_helper.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/blake2/blake2.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/bn/bn_asn1.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/bn/convert.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/bn/div.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/bn/exponentiation.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/bn/sqrt.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/buf/buf.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/bytestring/asn1_compat.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/bytestring/ber.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/bytestring/cbb.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/bytestring/cbs.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/bytestring/unicode.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/chacha/chacha.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/cipher/derive_key.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/cipher/e_aesctrhmac.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/cipher/e_aeseax.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/cipher/e_aesgcmsiv.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/cipher/e_chacha20poly1305.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/cipher/e_des.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/cipher/e_null.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/cipher/e_rc2.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/cipher/e_rc4.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/cipher/e_tls.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/cipher/get_cipher.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/cipher/tls_cbc.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/cms/cms.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/conf/conf.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/cpu_aarch64_apple.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/cpu_aarch64_fuchsia.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/cpu_aarch64_linux.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/cpu_aarch64_openbsd.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/cpu_aarch64_sysreg.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/cpu_aarch64_win.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/cpu_arm_freebsd.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/cpu_arm_linux.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/cpu_intel.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/crypto.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/curve25519/curve25519.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/curve25519/curve25519_64_adx.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/curve25519/spake25519.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/des/des.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/dh/dh_asn1.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/dh/params.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/digest/digest_extra.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/dsa/dsa.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/dsa/dsa_asn1.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/ec/ec_asn1.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/ec/ec_derive.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/ec/hash_to_curve.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/ecdh/ecdh.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/ecdsa/ecdsa_asn1.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/ecdsa/ecdsa_p1363.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/engine/engine.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/err/err.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/evp/evp.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/evp/evp_asn1.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/evp/evp_ctx.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/evp/evp_kem.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/evp/p_dh.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/evp/p_dsa.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/evp/p_ec.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/evp/p_ed25519.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/evp/p_hkdf.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/evp/p_mldsa.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/evp/p_mlkem.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/evp/p_rsa.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/evp/p_x25519.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/evp/p_xwing.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/evp/pbkdf.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/evp/print.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/evp/scrypt.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/evp/sign.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/ex_data.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/fipsmodule/fips_shared_support.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/fuzzer_mode.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/hpke/hpke.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/hrss/hrss.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/kyber/kyber.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/lhash/lhash.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/md4/md4.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/md5/md5.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/mem.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/mldsa/mldsa.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/mlkem/mlkem.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/obj/obj.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/obj/obj_xref.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/pem/pem_all.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/pem/pem_info.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/pem/pem_lib.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/pem/pem_oth.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/pem/pem_pk8.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/pem/pem_pkey.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/pem/pem_x509.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/pem/pem_xaux.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/pkcs7/pkcs7.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/pkcs7/pkcs7_x509.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/pkcs8/p5_pbev2.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/pkcs8/pkcs8.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/pkcs8/pkcs8_x509.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/poly1305/poly1305.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/poly1305/poly1305_arm.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/poly1305/poly1305_vec.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/pool/pool.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/rand/deterministic.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/rand/fork_detect.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/rand/forkunsafe.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/rand/getentropy.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/rand/ios.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/rand/rand.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/rand/trusty.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/rand/urandom.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/rand/windows.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/rc4/rc4.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/refcount.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/rsa/rsa_asn1.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/rsa/rsa_crypt.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/rsa/rsa_extra.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/rsa/rsa_print.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/sha/sha1.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/sha/sha256.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/sha/sha512.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/siphash/siphash.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/slhdsa/slhdsa.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/spake2plus/spake2plus.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/stack/stack.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/thread.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/thread_none.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/thread_pthread.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/thread_win.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/trust_token/pmbtoken.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/trust_token/trust_token.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/trust_token/voprf.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/a_digest.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/a_sign.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/a_verify.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/algorithm.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/asn1_gen.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/by_dir.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/by_file.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/i2d_pr.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/name_print.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/policy.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/rsa_pss.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/t_crl.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/t_req.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/t_x509.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/t_x509a.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/v3_akey.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/v3_akeya.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/v3_alt.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/v3_bcons.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/v3_bitst.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/v3_conf.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/v3_cpols.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/v3_crld.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/v3_enum.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/v3_extku.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/v3_genn.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/v3_ia5.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/v3_info.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/v3_int.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/v3_lib.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/v3_ncons.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/v3_ocsp.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/v3_pcons.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/v3_pmaps.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/v3_prn.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/v3_purp.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/v3_skey.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/v3_utl.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/x509.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/x509_att.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/x509_cmp.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/x509_d2.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/x509_def.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/x509_ext.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/x509_lu.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/x509_obj.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/x509_req.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/x509_set.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/x509_trs.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/x509_txt.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/x509_v3.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/x509_vfy.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/x509_vpm.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/x509cset.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/x509name.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/x509rset.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/x509spki.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/x_algor.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/x_all.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/x_attrib.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/x_crl.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/x_exten.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/x_name.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/x_pubkey.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/x_req.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/x_sig.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/x_spki.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/x_x509.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/x509/x_x509a.cc
    ${BSSL}/crypto/xwing/xwing.cc
    ${BSSL}/gen/crypto/err_data.cc
)
set(BCM_SOURCES
    ${BSSL}/crypto/fipsmodule/bcm.cc
)
set(PKI_SOURCES
    ${BSSL}/pki/cert_error_id.cc
    ${BSSL}/pki/cert_error_params.cc
    ${BSSL}/pki/cert_errors.cc
    ${BSSL}/pki/cert_issuer_source_static.cc
    ${BSSL}/pki/certificate.cc
    ${BSSL}/pki/certificate_policies.cc
    ${BSSL}/pki/common_cert_errors.cc
    ${BSSL}/pki/crl.cc
    ${BSSL}/pki/encode_values.cc
    ${BSSL}/pki/extended_key_usage.cc
    ${BSSL}/pki/general_names.cc
    ${BSSL}/pki/input.cc
    ${BSSL}/pki/ip_util.cc
    ${BSSL}/pki/merkle_tree.cc
    ${BSSL}/pki/name_constraints.cc
    ${BSSL}/pki/ocsp.cc
    ${BSSL}/pki/parse_certificate.cc
    ${BSSL}/pki/parse_name.cc
    ${BSSL}/pki/parse_values.cc
    ${BSSL}/pki/parsed_certificate.cc
    ${BSSL}/pki/parser.cc
    ${BSSL}/pki/path_builder.cc
    ${BSSL}/pki/pem.cc
    ${BSSL}/pki/revocation_util.cc
    ${BSSL}/pki/signature_algorithm.cc
    ${BSSL}/pki/simple_path_builder_delegate.cc
    ${BSSL}/pki/string_util.cc
    ${BSSL}/pki/trust_store.cc
    ${BSSL}/pki/trust_store_collection.cc
    ${BSSL}/pki/trust_store_in_memory.cc
    ${BSSL}/pki/verify.cc
    ${BSSL}/pki/verify_certificate_chain.cc
    ${BSSL}/pki/verify_error.cc
    ${BSSL}/pki/verify_name_match.cc
    ${BSSL}/pki/verify_signed_data.cc
)
set(SSL_SOURCES
    ${BSSL}/ssl/bio_ssl.cc
    ${BSSL}/ssl/d1_both.cc
    ${BSSL}/ssl/d1_lib.cc
    ${BSSL}/ssl/d1_pkt.cc
    ${BSSL}/ssl/d1_srtp.cc
    ${BSSL}/ssl/dtls_method.cc
    ${BSSL}/ssl/dtls_record.cc
    ${BSSL}/ssl/encrypted_client_hello.cc
    ${BSSL}/ssl/extensions.cc
    ${BSSL}/ssl/handoff.cc
    ${BSSL}/ssl/handshake.cc
    ${BSSL}/ssl/handshake_client.cc
    ${BSSL}/ssl/handshake_server.cc
    ${BSSL}/ssl/s3_both.cc
    ${BSSL}/ssl/s3_lib.cc
    ${BSSL}/ssl/s3_pkt.cc
    ${BSSL}/ssl/ssl_aead_ctx.cc
    ${BSSL}/ssl/ssl_asn1.cc
    ${BSSL}/ssl/ssl_buffer.cc
    ${BSSL}/ssl/ssl_cert.cc
    ${BSSL}/ssl/ssl_cipher.cc
    ${BSSL}/ssl/ssl_credential.cc
    ${BSSL}/ssl/ssl_file.cc
    ${BSSL}/ssl/ssl_key_share.cc
    ${BSSL}/ssl/ssl_lib.cc
    ${BSSL}/ssl/ssl_privkey.cc
    ${BSSL}/ssl/ssl_session.cc
    ${BSSL}/ssl/ssl_stat.cc
    ${BSSL}/ssl/ssl_transcript.cc
    ${BSSL}/ssl/ssl_versions.cc
    ${BSSL}/ssl/ssl_x509.cc
    ${BSSL}/ssl/t1_enc.cc
    ${BSSL}/ssl/tls13_both.cc
    ${BSSL}/ssl/tls13_client.cc
    ${BSSL}/ssl/tls13_enc.cc
    ${BSSL}/ssl/tls13_server.cc
    ${BSSL}/ssl/tls_method.cc
    ${BSSL}/ssl/tls_record.cc
)
# Legacy ciphers WebCrypto needs (AES-CFB EVP_aes_*_cfb128 etc.) live in BoringSSL's
# decrepit module, not the core lib. Build them in so libcrypto is self-contained.
set(DECREPIT_SOURCES
    ${BSSL}/decrepit/bio/base64_bio.cc
    ${BSSL}/decrepit/blowfish/blowfish.cc
    ${BSSL}/decrepit/cast/cast.cc
    ${BSSL}/decrepit/cast/cast_tables.cc
    ${BSSL}/decrepit/cfb/cfb.cc
    ${BSSL}/decrepit/des/cfb64ede.cc
    ${BSSL}/decrepit/dh/dh_decrepit.cc
    ${BSSL}/decrepit/dsa/dsa_decrepit.cc
    ${BSSL}/decrepit/evp/dss1.cc
    ${BSSL}/decrepit/evp/evp_do_all.cc
    ${BSSL}/decrepit/obj/obj_decrepit.cc
    ${BSSL}/decrepit/rc4/rc4_decrepit.cc
    ${BSSL}/decrepit/ripemd/ripemd.cc
    ${BSSL}/decrepit/rsa/rsa_decrepit.cc
    ${BSSL}/decrepit/ssl/ssl_decrepit.cc
    ${BSSL}/decrepit/x509/x509_decrepit.cc
    ${BSSL}/decrepit/xts/xts.cc
)
add_library(crypto STATIC ${CRYPTO_SOURCES} ${BCM_SOURCES} ${PKI_SOURCES} ${DECREPIT_SOURCES})
add_library(ssl STATIC ${SSL_SOURCES})
foreach(t crypto ssl)
  target_include_directories(${t} PRIVATE ${BSSL} ${BSSL}/include)
  target_compile_options(${t} PRIVATE /FI${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/uwp_compat.h)
  target_compile_definitions(${t} PRIVATE OPENSSL_NO_ASM OPENSSL_STATIC_ARMCAP OPENSSL_STATIC_ARMCAP_NEON NOMINMAX WIN32_LEAN_AND_MEAN _WINSOCK_DEPRECATED_NO_WARNINGS _CRT_SECURE_NO_WARNINGS _USE_MATH_DEFINES)
endforeach()
